title: Garlicky Crispy German Rye Bread Wrap
description: A flavorful and crunchy German wrap made with garlicky rye bread, tadka spices, and wrapped in a ti-leaf wrap, perfect for a satisfying snack or meal.

ingredients.name: Tadka spices
ingredients.notes: available at Indian grocery stores or online

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add 1 tsp vegetable oil and swirl it around.
Add the tadka spices and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add 2 tbsp water and bring to a simmer.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped cilantro and cook for another minute, until wilted.
Meanwhile, warm the rye bread in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the garlic-cilantro mixture on the rye bread, followed by a drizzle of lemon juice and honey.
Place the wrapped rye bread in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Cut the wrap in half and serve hot.
